heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 3510 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the President to carry out this chapter, in addition to funds otherwise available for such purpose, $12,000,000 for the fiscal year 1981. Funds appropriated under this section are authorized to remain available until expended.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title IV of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title IV to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 96–5393 Stat. 371Aug. 14, 1979
Amendments1980— substituted appropriations authorization of $12,000,000 for fiscal year 1981 for such authorization of $23,750,000 for fiscal year 1980.Pub. L. 96–533
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1979 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1979section 512(a) of Pub. L. 96–53section 2151 of this title
